title: Decadent Molten Slovakian Foie Gras Skillet
description: A rich and savory Slovakian dish featuring foie gras, quickly cooked to perfection in a skillet, served with a side of namul blanched and seasoned vegetables, making it an egg free friendly option.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat.
Sear the foie gras for 2 minutes on each side, then set aside.
Add the paprika, garlic, and onion to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they are tender.
Add the namul to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season the mixture with salt and black pepper.
Return the foie gras to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
Serve the foie gras and vegetables hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Let the dish rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
